title: unifolium dilatatum
intro: Unifolium dilatatum, also known as American pennyroyal, is a perennial herb native to North America, characterized by its square stem and small, green leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its carminative and antispasmodic properties, which help to ease digestive issues, relieve headaches, and reduce menstrual cramps. Its health benefits include its ability to aid in weight loss, improve respiratory function, and act as a natural insect repellent. Unifolium dilatatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and essential oils, which are often used to calm digestive issues, relieve stress, and promote a restful sleep.
